headlines.title: Trump mulls inaugural flight of new Air Force One at Mount Rushmore event
headlines.description: President Trump is considering taking the inaugural flight of the new Air Force One jet when he travels to Mount Rushmore next month as part of celebrations for America’s 250th anniversary, according to a senior White House official and a source familiar with the plans.

headlines.title: He took his wife, a Trump fan, to the president’s hotel in Doral. Instead he was detained by ICE.
headlines.description: Bryan José Rojas Galofre wanted to give his wife a lovely honeymoon to see the beach for the first time and perhaps a glimpse of President Donald Trump, whom she supports

headlines.title: Trump says alleged leader of Tren de Aragua gang killed in U.S. strike
headlines.description: The president said the military strike that killed Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, who’s known as Niño Guerrero, was carried out in coordination with Venezuela.

headlines.title: A key U.S. spying program expires Friday night. What does that mean?
headlines.description: The intelligence-gathering program that allows U.S. government surveillance of foreigners abroad by collecting domestic communication information is set to expire at the end of the day Friday after the House and Senate left town without passing an extension

headlines.title: How Trump’s UFC fight at White House is, in some ways, rooted in presidential history
headlines.description: There's plenty of fanfare and controversy surrounding the UFC Freedom 250 match set for this weekend at the White House. NBC News' Gary Grumbach takes a look at President Trump’s ties to the UFC, along with a long line of presidents who also enjoyed a good fight.

headlines.title: Wrongfully detained Iranian-American journalist pleads for release
headlines.description: In an audio recording obtained by NBC News, Reza Valizadeh, an Iranian-American journalist wrongfully detained in Tehran’s notorious Evin prison, makes a plea to the Trump administration to secure his release. His lawyer Ryan Fayhee joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss the case.

headlines.title: John Fetterman calls Graham Platner a ‘bona fide dirtbag’: Full interview
headlines.description: Sen. John Fetterman (D-Pa.) joins Meet the Press NOW to tout the Democratic candidates in the 2026 Senate races with the exception of Graham Platner (D-Maine) who he calls a “bona fide dirtbag” and a “communist.” Sen. Fetterman also reacts to the latest developments in the negotiations between the U.S. and Iran.

headlines.title: U.S. deportation tracker: Counting arrests, detentions and border crossings
headlines.description: President Donald Trump came into office promising the largest mass deportation in U.S history, targeting the more than 10 million unauthorized migrants living in the United States.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: DOJ approves Paramount Skydance’s acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery
headlines.description: The Justice Department has signed off on Paramount Skydance’s $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery, a person familiar with the matter told NBC News.

headlines.title: Runoffs provide Trump’s next big GOP tests: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, we look ahead to what’s at stake for President Donald Trump in a handful of upcoming Republican primary runoffs.

headlines.title: Hunter Biden says his father ‘chose me over his legacy’ with controversial pardon
headlines.description: The former president’s son told Gov. Gavin Newsom in a podcast that the 2024 pardon from his father shows “how much you know my dad loves me.”
